title: POTTERY BARN KIDS AND POTTERY BARN TEEN LAUNCH NEW COLLECTION WITH LILLY PULITZER
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pottery Barn Kids and Pottery Barn Teen, members of the Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) portfolio of brands, the world's largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, today announced new collections with renowned resort wear brand, Lilly Pulitzer. title: Williams-Sonoma: A Quality Company On Sale
text: The sharp pullback in WSM's price from November 2021 to January 2022 is overdone for a profitable company that has growth (41.91% EPS and 12.61% revenue in 2022) in it. Concerns about a slow-down in real estate and rising interest rates weigh on the stock but these are overblown.
